nasb.text: When the harvest time approached, he sent his slaves to the vine-growers to receive his produce.

esv.text: When the season for fruit drew near, he sent his servants  to the tenants to get his fruit.

cnv.text: 到了收成的時候，園主派了僕人到佃戶那裡，收取應該納給他的果子。

ccb.text: 到了收获的季节，园主派奴仆到佃户那里收果子。

csbs.text: 当收果子的季节近了，主人就派了奴仆们到那些农夫那里去收取他的果子。
